title: Yijing Hexagram 9: Xiao Chu (The Taming Power of the Small)
description: Hexagram 9 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 9 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: The Taming Power of the Small has success. Dense clouds, no rain from our western region. The wind drives across heaven.
